description:
A Health Informatics Specialist at a hospital needs to comply with a new internal privacy rule: 'Any access to the contact details or compensation of Executive staff (Salary ≥ $15,000) must be logged for review.' Implement a Fine-Grained Auditing (FGA) policy named 'AUDIT_VIP_ACCESS' on the HR.EMPLOYEES table that triggers on SELECT statements when the SALARY is greater than or equal to 15,000 and any of the following columns are accessed: SALARY, EMAIL, or PHONE_NUMBER. After verifying the policy, export the resulting audit records to /home/ga/Desktop/vip_audit_proof.csv including the DB_USER, OBJECT_NAME, SQL_TEXT, and TIMESTAMP columns.

Database Credentials:
- System Administrator: User: system, Password: OraclePassword123, Host: localhost, Port: 1521, Service: XEPDB1
- HR User: User: hr, Password: hr123
